history.title: Indiana Jones 5: Steven Spielberg and Harrison Ford announce new movie
history.description: Lucasfilm just got the boulder rolling again …Steven Spielberg and Harrison Ford will be reteaming for another Indiana Jones movie, set for release in summer of 2019. Here’s the announcement: Indiana Jones will return to the big screen on July 19, 2019, for a fifth epic adventure in the blockbuster
